name: @conduit-harness/conduit-runner-openai-api
description: (DEPRECATED) Conduit runner plugin that calls an OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint directly. Does not wrap an agentic harness; prefer @conduit-harness/conduit-runner-claude-cli, conduit-runner-codex-cli, or conduit-runner-aider.
deprecated: This runner calls a chat-completions endpoint directly with no agentic harness (no agent loop, no tool execution, no context management). It does not conform to Conduit's runner contract. Use conduit-runner-claude-cli, conduit-runner-codex-cli, or conduit-runner-aider instead. See docs/UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.
